summary: AI career prediction chatbot website with Internet Identity authentication, beautiful frontend, logo, login/signup functionality, and AI-powered career guidance based on user input
architectural_notes: Frontend built with React and TypeScript (modern alternative to vanilla HTML/CSS/JS)
Backend uses Motoko on Internet Computer
Internet Identity for secure passkey-based authentication
AI career prediction functionality integrated into chat interface
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Professional logo for career prediction AI platform featuring modern, abstract design elements suggesting growth and future vision (logo.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity authentication system with login and signup functionality allowing users to authenticate using passkeys or social accounts
Create a chat interface where authenticated users can input their career ideas and questions
Design a beautiful, modern frontend with a professional color scheme and typography that creates a welcoming, trustworthy atmosphere for career guidance, avoiding blue and purple tones
Create and display a distinctive logo for the career prediction website that appears on the landing page and throughout the application
Integrate generated logo and any supporting visual assets as static files in the frontend public assets directory

new_feature_requests.summary: Beautiful frontend UI with logo and branding
Chat interface for users to input career ideas and receive AI predictions
Implement backend logic to process career-related questions and generate AI-powered future predictions and career guidance based on user input
